author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Add the servo power supply to the shopping list**

The safety rules require an external 5–6 V servo supply and forbid powering six servos from the Arduino 5 V pin, but the paste-ready hardware add-on only mentions the PCA9685 driver. If the friend also lacks a suitable high-current supply/common-ground wiring parts, the Day 7 arm demo either stalls or nudges an unsafe workaround. Include the supply/capacitor/wiring in the add-on, or add a required confirmation that he already has them.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
